steps.screen:
[23CIt is written in the Book of Odin:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[27CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[27Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[27Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[27CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[23CYour god Odin seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[23Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Stripling, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Odin.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Odin!
[23C--More--




Wizard the Stripling[11CSt:15 Dx:15 Co:18 In:8 Wi:8 Ch:11 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:16(16) Pw:2(2) AC:0 Xp:1

Velkommen wizard, welcome to NetHack!  You are a neutral human Valkyrie.

engravings.text: Been Here.  Now Gone.  Had a Good Time.
And then 'e nailed me 'ead to the floor!
Oh! An untimely death.
Come Monday, I'll be all right.
He died of the flux.
I will not go quietly.
Is there life before Death?
It happens sometimes.  People just explode.
Here lies Dudley, killed by another %&#@#& newt.
Every survival kit should include a sense of humor
For recreational use only.
He died of the flux.
I'm gonna make it!
Cover me, I'm going in!
Fatty and skinny went to bed.  Fatty rolled over and skinny was dead.  Skinny Smith 1983-2000.
And you said it was pretty here...
Where e'er you be let your wind go free.  Keeping it in was the death of me!
And so it ends?
After all, what are friends for...
Would you mind moving a bit?  I'm short of breath down here.
Grave?  But I was cremated!
Here lies my wife: Here let her lie! Now she's at rest and so am I.
